basic_details.job_title: Paradip Port Authority Traffic Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Paradip Port Authority Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Traffic Manager (HOD). Candidates with degree Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Paradip Port Authority official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Paradip Port Authority Traffic Manager (HOD) Recruitment 2026.
